methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 59.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Dispatch Space is a pre-seed stage company in Space & Aerospace founded by Payton Case and Andrew Mello. The valuation analysis draws from a comp universe of 13 identifiable peers: 5 public companies (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private firms including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace.

Two standard triangulation methods were evaluated but neither proved applicable. Peer-Median benchmarking was inapplicable due to insufficient narrow-stage comparables—while 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, zero met the filters for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar valuation-tier clustering. Public-Comp Anchoring could not be applied because Dispatch Space's revenue is not on file, which is standard for private pre-seed companies. The public Space & Aerospace sector trades at a 59.8x P/S median across the 6-ticker sample, but this multiple cannot be meaningfully applied without revenue data.

Given the absence of applicable quantitative methods, this analysis cannot support a specific valuation range. The core constraint is lack of revenue disclosure (expected at pre-seed stage) and an absence of sufficiently similar pre-seed comparables in the Space & Aerospace sector. Progression to a funded seed or Series A round, accompanied by revenue or ARR disclosure and/or observable market transactions in the pre-seed frontier-tech space, would enable revised triangulation.
